root.Text_ENG: The one who is trying to summon Thagirion into the Normalside.
root.Text_DEU: The one who is trying to summon Thagirion into the Normalside.
root.Text_FRA: The one who is trying to summon Thagirion into the Normalside.

root.Text_ENG: I've been waiting for you.
root.Text_DEU: I've been waiting for you.
root.Text_FRA: I've been waiting for you.

root.Text_ENG: I shall let monsters worthy of your downfall deal with you.
root.Text_DEU: I shall let monsters worthy of your downfall deal with you.
root.Text_FRA: I shall let monsters worthy of your downfall deal with you.

root.Text_ENG: No, you don't.
root.Text_DEU: No, you don't.
root.Text_FRA: No, you don't.

root.Text_ENG: K-killer Hil is here! Run away!!
root.Text_DEU: K-killer Hil is here! Run away!!
root.Text_FRA: K-killer Hil is here! Run away!!

root.Text_ENG: That's quite an entertaining remark.

root.Text_FRA: That's quite an entertaining remark.

root.Text_ENG: Is that all for your final words?

root.Text_ENG: Miss Mina!

root.Text_ENG: I'm tired of waiting! Blow them all away!!
root.Text_DEU: I'm tired of waiting! Blow them all away!!
root.Text_FRA: I'm tired of waiting! Blow them all away!!

root.Text_ENG: This reminds me of what happened in the Deep Floors.
root.Text_DEU: This reminds me of what happened in the Deep Floors.
root.Text_FRA: This reminds me of what happened in the Deep Floors.

root.Text_ENG: The thought that I can do it feels just like back then.
root.Text_DEU: The thought that I can do it feels just like back then.
root.Text_FRA: The thought that I can do it feels just like back then.

root.Text_ENG: Yes, I feel the same way.
root.Text_DEU: Yes, I feel the same way.
root.Text_FRA: Yes, I feel the same way.

root.Text_ENG: ...Let's go, Bell!
root.Text_DEU: ...Let's go, Bell!
root.Text_FRA: ...Let's go, Bell!

root.Text_ENG: Give me... the Red Moon... blood...
root.Text_DEU: Give me... the Red Moon... blood...
root.Text_FRA: Give me... the Red Moon... blood...

root.Text_ENG:
Look at you. Devoured your own family and followers, and now you
8kre just an evil spirit.

Look at you. Devoured your own family and followers, and now you
8kre just an evil spirit.
root.Text_FRA:
Look at you. Devoured your own family and followers, and now you
8kre just an evil spirit.

root.Text_ENG: Save the sob story and cough up the cash.
root.Text_DEU: Save the sob story and cough up the cash.

root.Text_ENG: I'm charging extra for the damage you caused on this job.
root.Text_DEU: I'm charging extra for the damage you caused on this job.
root.Text_FRA: I'm charging extra for the damage you caused on this job.

root.Text_ENG: I expected a little more, but this is all you've got?
root.Text_DEU: I expected a little more, but this is all you've got?
root.Text_FRA: I expected a little more, but this is all you've got?

root.Text_ENG: You're no longer worth facing.
root.Text_DEU: You're no longer worth facing.
root.Text_FRA: You're no longer worth facing.

root.Text_ENG: Hear me! All who have united their strength to defend this city!
root.Text_DEU: Hear me! All who have united their strength to defend this city!
root.Text_FRA: Hear me! All who have united their strength to defend this city!

root.Text_ENG: The vanguard will be led by us, the Zodiac Knights!

root.Text_FRA: The vanguard will be led by us, the Zodiac Knights!

root.Text_ENG: Hmph. How about I lend a little backup?

root.Text_ENG: If you're going to help, how about giving it everything you've got?

root.Text_ENG: Just a little longer, until she arrives...!

root.Text_ENG: Honestly, this is nothing but a losing deal!
